name: mcp-server-harness
description: Provides seamless integration with Harness APIs.

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with clear, purposeful tool names and adequate descriptions covering basic functionality. Parameter documentation is generally clear with helpful constraints and examples. Minor gaps include some descriptions that could be more comprehensive (especially around usage context and limitations) and a few parameters that could benefit from more detailed explanations, but the toolset is broadly usable without confusion.
